calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-22-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Prove-Up Hearing Iso Mtn For Default Judgment & Mtn For Default Judgment After Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-20-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Mary Ellmann Tang, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Union Bank, N.A.
Conchita Miller sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Jimmy Budihalim, aka Jimmy Sukanda.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $180,187.85
Pre-Judgment Interest at the rate of 5.78 percent per annum from March 28, 2010 through June 18, 2013 for a total of: $33,659.08
Attorney's Fees: $2,600.00
Costs: $684.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $217,130.93
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-22-2013 Continued To Aug-07-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2013 Continued To Jun-05-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
